subject: Feature Request
summary: User requests the ability to organize QCMs into folders/categories and delete unwanted QCMs, citing accumulation and disorganization as pain points.
full_content:
Name: Kald
Email: k52693693012@gmail.com

Hello,
I recently started using your app and I really like the idea behind it, it's very helpful for studying.
That said, I've been running into an issue with managing the QCMs. Right now, there's no way to organize them into folders or categories, which makes things messy once you generate several of them. It also doesn't seem possible to delete QCMs, so they just keep accumulating.
It would really improve the experience if we could at least organize QCMs and remove the ones we don't need anymore. It would make the app much easier to use on a daily basis.
Thank you for your work and I hope you consider this.
Best regards,
